title: Day 1
text:
Overview
In Day 1, we will cover the basics of AI-assisted coding, understanding what coding agents are, and getting started with basic workflows.

title: Day 3
text:
Overview
In Day 3, we will learn how to build our own tools, use custom providers, and extend the capabilities of AI coding agents.

title: Welcome to the AI-Assisted Coding Workshop
text: Welcome to our 3-day workshop on AI-assisted coding! Use the navigation bar to browse through the daily lessons.

title: Day 2
text:
Overview
In Day 2, we will dive deep into advanced prompting techniques, context management, and integrating AI tools into your daily development environment.
